# OneLiteFeather Network

> OneLiteFeather is a Minecraft Network focusing on the development of tools with the intention to share with other servers.

OneLiteFeather.net is the official website of the OneLiteFeather Minecraft Network. The site is available in English and German.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://onelitefeather.net/en/): Overview of the OneLiteFeather Minecraft Network
- [Blog](https://onelitefeather.net/en/blog): Development blog with articles about Minecraft server development, community updates, and technical guides
- [BlueMap](https://onelitefeather.net/en/bluemap): Interactive 3D map of the Minecraft server

## About

OneLiteFeather is a Minecraft Network founded in 2019 that focuses on developing open-source tools for the Minecraft server community. The network shares development tools, plugins, and knowledge with other servers.

## Open Source

OneLiteFeather actively develops and maintains open-source projects on GitHub: https://github.com/OneLiteFeatherNET

## Funding

OneLiteFeather is community-funded via OpenCollective: https://opencollective.com/onelitefeather

## Contact

- Email: contact@onelitefeather.net
- GitHub: https://github.com/OneLiteFeatherNET
- Discord: https://1lf.link/discord

## Languages

- English: https://onelitefeather.net/en/
- German (Deutsch): https://onelitefeather.net/de/
